components.moderation.block.description: Blocked accounts cannot reply in your threads, mention you, or otherwise interact with you.
components.moderation.block.descriptionL: Blocking won't stop this labeler's labels from being applied to your account.
Blocking will not prevent labels from being applied on your account, but it will stop this account from replying in your threads or interacting with you.

components.moderation.block.noSeePosts: They can't see your posts and you won't see theirs or any replies to them
